data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for bulk distribution to employee groups.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the capability for bulk distribution to employee groups, as stated in the requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for bulk distribution, but there are no concrete examples or evidence of this feature being implemented or tested, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence of bulk distribution functionality for employee groups.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the bulk distribution requirement.
